title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: Each Sun 1s a thought of God, and each Planet a mode of that thought. What do the Constellations ? What say the numbers ?— What revolve the spheres ? O lost or saved souls, they speak, they sing, they roll... . Your destinies. -HERMES,

title: Temperament And Intellect
location: Section V — Sub-section XIX — Temperament And Intellect
text: Happy is the man that findeth wisdom, and the man who getteth understanding.—PROVERBS. WE must look principally to the sign ascending and the position of the Moon and Mercury for making a judgment of the temperament and intellect. The 10th House with the sign and planets therein has an influence on the mind—Mercury being the greatest power in regard to the mental faculties, and the understanding ; for he reflects the influences of the other planets with which he is in aspect, and the signs wherein he is posited at birth, and by progression. The instincts, emotions, and natural inclinations are governed by the Moon. If the planet or planets aspecting the Moon and Mercury are in the Ist or 10th Houses, their influence is greatly increased—as these two houses have much power over the temperament and intellect. The moon well aspected by the trine, sextile, or conjunction of Mercury at birth will give splendid abilities—ingenuity, wit, adaptability. The square and opposition are better than no aspects, but it makes the mind obstinate and cynical. The Moon square or opposition Mars or Uranus will bring “nerve storms,’ making for irritability with fits of depression. With Mercury in bad aspect to these malefics, one would be argumentative, always critical, with an angry jealous temper, also untruthful. The cardinal signs give activity

title: Temperament And Intellect
location: Section V — Sub-section XIX — Temperament And Intellect
text: Mars or Uranus will bring “nerve storms,’ making for irritability with fits of depression. With Mercury in bad aspect to these malefics, one would be argumentative, always critical, with an angry jealous temper, also untruthful. The cardinal signs give activity and ambition; the fixed signs are the slow, unbending, mdependent people; and the mutable signs give changeable, versatile, adaptable temperaments. Mercury in the 1st House, in trine or sextile aspect to the Moon, will give intellectual aptitude for knowledge. If in the houses of Mars, especially Aries, he confers eloquence; in Saturn’s houses, Capricornus and Aquarius, he bestows a meditative and inquiring mind ; in trine, sextile, or conjunction Saturn, clear judgment and a love of mysticism. Mercury within 17 degrees of the Sun gives abilities of the highest order. If the Moon or Mercury do not aspect each other or the Asc., and are afflicted by squares and oppositions of the malefics, the person is liable to become insane. The thoughts and temperament can be judged by the ruler of the Asc., by the sign it is in, and the aspects it receives; if with a trine, sextile, or conjunction Jupiter or Venus, it indicates a happy, tolerant, merry, loving disposition, with that charm of manner that draws the love of others. The aspects of the malefics in square

title: Temperament And Intellect
location: Section V — Sub-section XIX — Temperament And Intellect
text: the aspects it receives; if with a trine, sextile, or conjunction Jupiter or Venus, it indicates a happy, tolerant, merry, loving disposition, with that charm of manner that draws the love of others. The aspects of the malefics in square or opposition would

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XIX — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: indicate the contrary. The Moon trine or sextile Mars gives physical energy, but a passionate nature ; in conjunction Mars and Mercury, an excitable mind, but courage of opinions. The Moon in the Ist or 10th House aspecting Mercury, the bent of the nature is romantic and imaginative, travel and changes are preferred to home life; it also gives “‘ good manners,” one of the greatest charms and advantages to possess. When in aspect to Jupiter, joviality and a humane nature. Venus, refinement and artistic talents. Uranus, a gift for inventions and sciences. Neptune, poetry and psychism. If the Moon, Sun, Mercury, or planets have few aspects at birth, this indicates slow development of the personality and mental faculties, but when progressing to aspects of one another, there comes an awakening, being then bestirred to action. This is certainly so when Mercury comes within the orb of the natal Sun or Moon. These planets having the power to endow the mind with activity, and the intellect with understanding, this mental development often unfolds undoubted talents ; the signs and houses holding the planets in aspect will indicate the nature. Mercury—in airy signs, Gemini, Libra, Aquarius, conjunction, trine, or sextile Jupiter or Uranus, gives a clever, original mind, fond of learning and attracted to literature and science, and if rising or

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XIX — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: holding the planets in aspect will indicate the nature. Mercury—in airy signs, Gemini, Libra, Aquarius, conjunction, trine, or sextile Jupiter or Uranus, gives a clever, original mind, fond of learning and attracted to literature and science, and if rising or on the M.C. eloquent in discourse. The Moon trine or sextile with the Sun gives a well-balanced temperament. The Sun, Moon, and Mercury, in conjunction, great intellectual abilities. The Moon, conjunction with Saturn, in earthy signs, makes one of a melancholy nature. The Moon, trine or sextile with Saturn, inclines one to be cautious and discriminating.

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XX — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: Position, RicuErs, AnD PossEssIoNsS For he had great possessions.—St. MaTTrHEw. Jupiter on the M.C. in the 10th House, trine, sextile, or in conjunction the Sun or Moon, is one of the best positions for the acquirement of riches and worldly recognition ; but if Saturn is in that house and not well fortified by trines and sextiles of the Sun or Moon, it will bring poverty and disgrace. The Sun posited on the M.C. in trine or sextile aspect to the Moon, and the Moon m conjunction with Jupiter, is undoubtedly another good augury for success and possessions, but the square or opposition is unfortunate. The Moon in the 10th House, in trine, sextile, or conjunction Venus or Jupiter, and the Sun in trine aspect, indicates riches and a position of eminence and security—it will give much honour and dignity. The Sun or Moon trine with the M.C., m conjunction Venus or Jupiter, brings fame and great

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XX — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: protection to the position and name. Saturn in opposition or square the M.C., will bring danger of loss of position and ill-fame. The Sun or Moon trine or sextile Mars, will give an indomitable spirit and energy to overcome obstacles and difficulties. The career in life that one is most fitted for is shown by the sign on the 10th House and the planets therein. Also the aspects to the Sun, its sign and position in the horoscope, for this will be the lie of least resistance. So if Mercury should rule he produces writers, teachers, merchants, and bankers. Venus—musicians, artists, makers of wearing apparel or perfumers, shop-keepers. | Jupiter—a professional career, orators, members of Parliament, judges, and bishops. Saturn—positions of responsibility, land and property. Uranus—science, engineering, government or civil officials. Mars—surgeons, soldiers, sailors. Neptune—work of an inspirational nature— psychism. The success of these careers depends on the good aspects of the Sun and Moon ; special notice should be taken of the houses that hold the benefic aspects to the planet on the M.C., for the sign and planets on the mid-heaven show the native’s highest ideal—or greatest desires—the most of which the nature is capable and for what each is temperamentally fitted. The Sun, Moon, and planets on the houses of the Cardinal Cross are the most important.

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XX — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: on the mid-heaven show the native’s highest ideal—or greatest desires—the most of which the nature is capable and for what each is temperamentally fitted. The Sun, Moon, and planets on the houses of the Cardinal Cross are the most important. Remember the Ist House represents oneself. In the case of malefics posited here and afflicted by the Sun, Moon, or planets, or any evil signified by this house, one will only have oneself to blame for failure and non-success of the life ; for it will give a temperament difficult for others to understand, and one is likely to do the thing that will keep one back in the career or will give either a manner or an expression of personality that annoys other people, and brings criticism. But if this house is well dignified by trines and sextiles, here are the people who make a success of life—not so much by their talents, but by charm of personality and understanding of others. The 7th House represents the world—public life. The Sun, Moon, or planets well aspected here, one will attain riches and honour, be in a prominent position or be so placed as to have to deal with the multitude ; but if this house is afflicted by squares and oppositions, especially of malefics, it is better not to

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XX — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: attain riches and honour, be in a prominent position or be so placed as to have to deal with the multitude ; but if this house is afflicted by squares and oppositions, especially of malefics, it is better not to seek public office or positions, as it would only bring severe criticism and condemnation. This 7th House is also important to the woman— for until recently her chief career has been marriage, and this house shows its success or failure, and whether she is fitted for the position and responsibility. For opposition from the lst House to the 7th in either a man’s or a woman’s horoscope will make that person difficult to live with in the married life.

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XX — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: The 4th House holding benefics, or well aspected by trines or sextiles, often brings inherited money and position. But if the Sun, Moon, or planets be afflicted in this house, everything to do with the parents proves unfortunate, and it is better to leave the place of birth and seek one’s happiness afar ; if the 9th House, or 10th, holds benefics, the further away from the home of childhood the greater the happiness. When in evil aspects to one another, the Moon, Saturn, Mars, Uranus, Neptune, and the Sun, from these four cardinal points will hamper one, keeping one back, with years of trials and difficulties, and success only attained, after great determination and patience ; which will be shown in the progressed horoscope—also how, where, and when, the life reaches smooth waters. When the nativity shows few aspects between the planets and the Sun or Moon, the early part of the life will be uneventful, but when by progression in the horoscope they reach other positions (in whichever years of the life these progressed aspects occur) they will bring greater activity and a little more excitement, and if most of the planets have congregated in one or two houses, it brmgs an overwhelming rush of events signified by those houses, almost more than one can cope with, and

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XX — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: bring greater activity and a little more excitement, and if most of the planets have congregated in one or two houses, it brmgs an overwhelming rush of events signified by those houses, almost more than one can cope with, and age does not enter into the considerations, for Astrology works in “ Sidereal time,” so these aspects can come when one is any age in “earth time.” It accounts for late marriages, or men and women marrying again late in life, for Venus in conjunction the Sun or Moon keeps one young-looking and it is an aspect that lasts for years ; the benefic rays of Jupiter and Venus to the Sun or Moon give a merry, loving, happy nature—either at birth or by progression, and not being temperamentally the age of those unfortunate individuals who were born, or by progression are, afflicted by malefics to their Sun, Moon, or Venus, especially Saturn and Neptune, for they are the planets that give the look of old age—if in evil aspect. If these good aspects are to the 3rd House, it indicates the power for creative mental work. If to the 9th House, journeys to faroff countries—for quite old people travel round the world and enjoy their journeys which bring them mental interest and exchange of ideas with people of other

If to the 9th House, journeys to faroff countries—for quite old people travel round the world and enjoy their journeys which bring them mental interest and exchange of ideas with people of other countries, widening the outlook on life. Saturn square or opposition, elevated above the luminaries and Venus-—unfortunate for money and inheritances. Neptune in evil aspect—gambling, racing, and all games of chance, are best left alone ; especially if the aspects are from the 5th House, or Neptune is in the 10th in opposition to or square with Venus, the Sun, or Moon ; Neptune elevated also brings loss of money by schemers or covert means of fraudulent trustees. Uranus square or in opposition to Venus and the luminaries will bring sudden and unexpected losses of money, especially with Uranus elevated ; when from the 12th House to the 3rd, brothers and sisters

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity

text: will prove unfortunate and they should not have any control over money or possessions; if from the 8th House, loss of partner’s money, or the belongings of those who are dead; Saturn, Mars, Uranus, or Neptune, in this house will bring a great deal of trouble and worry over the affairs of the partner, whether in marriage or business. The Sun square or in opposition to the Moon, with the Moon elevated in the sign of its fall in Scorpio, will bring bad business years and loss of money ; if Saturn should add its evil influence by square, conjunction, or opposition to either of the luminaries, it is very likely to make for bankruptcy. When Venus is in conjunction trine or sextile of the natal Moon, sextile or conjunction the Sun, it brings great prosperity, fortunate and happy events. Saturn trine or sextile the Sun or Moon in the natal map, or by progression, will bring the support, approval, and friendship of influential people, who have the power to advance one’s interests and position, and it brings with it a foundation and permanent good. Also help and advantages through the father or mother, and if this should be the strongest aspect for good in the horoscope, the greatest happmess and successes will come through those who are older in

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XX — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: a foundation and permanent good. Also help and advantages through the father or mother, and if this should be the strongest aspect for good in the horoscope, the greatest happmess and successes will come through those who are older in years than oneself. Building, land, and agriculture turn out well under these benign aspects of the luminaries and Saturn. But a square or opposition—the parents are not sympathetic, and one is opposed or meets with coldness and unfriendliness from powerful and established concerns and people; if to the 2nd House, these evil aspects bring poverty. The Sun, Moon, Jupiter, or Venus, elevated or in benefic aspect to one another, when trine or sextile the mid-heaven, are fortunate horoscopes for riches and possessions, for they bring “lucky chances ” and realisation of one’s ambitions. But where the malefics are elevated afflicting the luminaries, they will bring misfortune, loss of position and money, giving few opportunities for success or happiness, for they bring losses often beyond one’s power of control—that is the evil of Saturn. Uranus brings unexpected upheavals and estrangements of those in power; and the evil of Neptune is the undermining of one’s fortunes. Uranus trine or sextile the Sun, will bring the support and interest of those in power ; when to the Moon, fortunate and successful changes, often

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity

text: those in power; and the evil of Neptune is the undermining of one’s fortunes. Uranus trine or sextile the Sun, will bring the support and interest of those in power ; when to the Moon, fortunate and successful changes, often of country. The good aspects of the planets pomt to one’s opportunities, they never occur again in quite the same way. The evil aspects are for the experiences they bring, for there is no doubt that human nature at times requires chastisement—for who likes a spoilt child ? Riches, power, and position bring great tests of character; it means living in the limelight of the world of man—which is discipline—whether it is the ‘‘ Great World ” or one’s own particular sphere of

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XX — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: work, for Astrology is relative to one’s own life— riches to one man would be poverty to another. But whichever the position, be it the lowliest or the highest, one can only honour—the Just and the True.

title: Health And Sickness
location: Section V — Sub-section XXI — Health And Sickness
text: One of the greatest advantages in life is a healthy body—with a disease-resisting constitution. In an earlier chapter were given the signs of the Zodiac that are associated with certain parts of the body. The Sun, Moon, and planets also have dominion over health and disease. The signs of the Zodiac and houses that hold the Sun and Saturn in the horoscope of the man, and the Moon and Mars in a woman’s nativity, will show when afflicted with evil aspects, or the conjunction of Saturn or Mars, the part of the body that will be easily assailed by illness and disease; Saturn lowers the vitality, whilst Mars increases it to fever heat and excites the nervous system. The malefics Saturn, Mars, Uranus, and Neptune in the fixed signs also mean danger of accidents. The Sun gives the constitution—if elevated above the malefics, there is very little to fear in the way of disease. The Moon rules the health—and if elevated, there are few illnesses to contend with as one goes through life. Should the evil aspects be in the fixed signs, Taurus, Leo, Scorpio, Aquarius, in the 6th or 8th House, it points to organic weaknesses of the system. If in the cardinal signs, Aries, Cancer, Libra, Capricornus, the functional part of the body will develop trouble, and with

title: Health And Sickness
location: Section V — Sub-section XXI — Health And Sickness
text: fixed signs, Taurus, Leo, Scorpio, Aquarius, in the 6th or 8th House, it points to organic weaknesses of the system. If in the cardinal signs, Aries, Cancer, Libra, Capricornus, the functional part of the body will develop trouble, and with bad aspects of Saturn, Mars, Uranus, or Neptune to the Sun or Moon, when these points in the horoscope are transited by these malefics, there is danger of surgical operations. The common signs Gemini, Virgo, Sagittarius, Pisces, holding the evil aspects of malefics—to the Sun or Moon, Uranus square or in opposition, has a bad effect on the nervous system. With Mars also in opposition or square, brings fits of angry temper and “‘ nerve storms.” Saturn devitalises and brings depression, and Neptune makes one apprehensive ~ and morbid; these signs often give weak lungs, with a tendency to consumption. When the malefics are elevated, it is not a good sign for health. When the Sun by progression comes to conjunction with Venus or Jupiter, it much improves the health and appearance. The Sun or Moon posited in the Pleiades 29 Taurus, or in 6 Leo, or with the fixed star Antares 8 Sagittarius, afflicted by malefics, especially on the Cardinal Cross, brings defective eyesight and sometimes danger of blindness ; also if one of these degrees of the Zodiac

title: Health And Sickness
location: Section V — Sub-section XXI — Health And Sickness
text: 29 Taurus, or in 6 Leo, or with the fixed star Antares 8 Sagittarius, afflicted by malefics, especially on the Cardinal Cross, brings defective eyesight and sometimes danger of blindness ; also if one of these degrees of the Zodiac is the Asc., square, or in opposition the Moon, when in conjunction the Sun.

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XXI — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: If a malefic planet is in the same degree of the Zodiac as a fixed star of the nature of Saturn or Mars, and in evil aspect to the Sun or Moon and elevated, there is danger of accident and serious illnesses. The signs and “ house ”’ will point to the part of the body afflicted. The Sun, Moon, and planets in the 6th House, unless well fortified, will bring periods of bad health. Ptolemy warns us not to have operations on that part of the body that corresponds to the sign that holds the Moon at one’s birth or when by progression or transit, for he says, “ Pierce not with iron that part of the body which may be governed by the sign actually occupied by the Moon.” In a woman’s horoscope she will find that if the Moon or Venus be ill-aspected by Mars or Saturn, it will have a weakening effect on her health ; if from the 5th House, in Libra or Scorpio, dangerous and difficult child-birth ;Neptune and Uranus afflicting Mercury and the luminaries, extreme mental depression, anxiety, and worry ; with Mars, nerve tension— under bad transits, suicide. In serious illnesses the symptoms are difficult to diagnose under Uranus or Neptune. But good aspects of Jupiter or Venus to the Sun or

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XXI — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: luminaries, extreme mental depression, anxiety, and worry ; with Mars, nerve tension— under bad transits, suicide. In serious illnesses the symptoms are difficult to diagnose under Uranus or Neptune. But good aspects of Jupiter or Venus to the Sun or Moon, especially elevated, will pull one through the most severe attacks of illness, and convalescence will then berapid. Transits of Jupiter are beneficial here. Mars passing by transit through all the signs of the Zodiac once in twenty months, brings sudden attacks of illness and sickness, especially when in the 6th House or passing over the Asc., the “ Hyleg,”’ or any afflicted point of the horoscope. The sub-conscious mind has a tremendous power in helping to throw off illness and disease. The good aspects of Neptune are of great value, for they lead the thoughts away from the infirmities of the body and the dusky regions of matter, into the glorious light of those realms of the spirit where Divine Love makes everything perfect—in Reality. ‘Where the Spirit of Divine Life is—and there is no place where Divine Life is not—sickness becomes nothing.” —The Science of Mind-healing.

title: Love And Marriage
location: Section V — Sub-section XXII — Love And Marriage
text: Behold, thou art fair, my love ; behold, thou art fair; thou hast doves’ eyes. Behold, thou art fair, my beloved. My beloved spake, and said unto me, Rise up, my love, my fair one, and come away !— THE Sone oF SoLomon. Paracelsus says: “* There is neither absolute good nor absolute evil m marriage. It relates to the parties entering the contract and is, therefore, relative. Of our divine selves we do not seek unions ; it is the nature that is in us, also the experiences it will bring—discipline for the woman, a school of education for the man, for their edification or degradation.” Astrology reveals to us the planetary influences we are under—alluring and fascinating, bringing intoxication of love and sometimes fatal attractions.

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XXII — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: The Moon, Venus, and Mars in aspect in a man’s horoscope will bring love and marriage; and the Sun, Mars, and Venus in a woman’s. This is always by application—for when the planets are separating, it shows what is past; by application, that which is to come. Where the Moon and Venus are posited in a man’s horoscope, it denotes the type of woman who will have an invincible charm for him. The place the Sun and Mars are in in the woman’s horoscope will decide the type of man who will have the power to attract and fascinate her. The first planet the Moon applies to in a man’s nativity will describe the first serious attraction, and if that planet is not retrograde—the wife ; if it should be applying to more than one planet and there is a double sign on the 7th House, or the Moon is in a double sign, it implies more than one marriage— especially if the Moon is in conjunction Saturn. There are more widowers with aspects between Saturn and the Moon than in any other planetary configuration. If the Moon at birth is not applying to any planet, then take the ruler of the 7th House as the significator of the wife. The ruler of the 1st House aspecting the ruler of

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XXII — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: in any other planetary configuration. If the Moon at birth is not applying to any planet, then take the ruler of the 7th House as the significator of the wife. The ruler of the 1st House aspecting the ruler of the 7th, there is a desire for marriage. The Moon in aspect with Uranus retrograde, brings attraction and flirtation with married women ; if to Venus retrograde, young unmarried girls; if Venus is in square or opposition to Saturn, his love affairs will bring him sorrow, and if Mars adds its evil influence to the Moon or Venus, there will be scandal. The Moon, Venus, or Jupiter well dignified in the 7th House will bring a happy marriage. The Moon or Venus rising between the Ist and 10th Houses, or in the 5th House, between the 7th and 4th (these are known as the oriental places of the horoscope, to do with marriage in either sex), the love affairs start young and often bring an early marriage. The progressed Venus coming to a trine, sextile, or conjunction of the natal Moon, if at a suitable age, will bring love at first sight—in fiery signs, ardent and passionate. The fixed signs bring a deep and lasting love. If Venus or the Moon is trine or sextile Saturn, the woman will be

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XXII — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: Moon, if at a suitable age, will bring love at first sight—in fiery signs, ardent and passionate. The fixed signs bring a deep and lasting love. If Venus or the Moon is trine or sextile Saturn, the woman will be older; Venus and Mercury, much younger. The Moon applying to any planet retrograde, the marriage will not take place, designated by that planet which is R). | The Moon square Saturn or Uranus, unhappiness in the married life, ending m divorce, especially if Uranus is in the 7th House, for it always means separation. Mars square or opposition, serious quarrels—a bad-tempered, jealous wife, not always without cause. If the malefics are in the 7th House, it is better not to marry, as the wife would have a very difficult nature, that only leads to great unhappiness and separation. Neptune trine or sextile the Moon or Venus will brmg a romantic, elusive love, but

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XXII — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: Neptune and Mars in evil aspect to Venus and the Moon inclines to eroticism. The Sun represents the husband in a woman’s horoscope. If in aspect to Mars by trine or sextile, or Mars is trine or sextile Uranus, she will have an irresistible fascination for men, or when the Sun or Mars progresses to these aspects, especially from fiery or watery signs. But when Saturn afflicts the Sun either by square or opposition, she finds it very difficult to understand men, and more often than not repels than attracts; and with malefics in the 7th House, it would be better for her not to marry. When the ruler of the 1st House is applying to a good aspect of the lord of the 7th, it will improve affairs—or at the age these aspects occur, would bring opportunities for marriage. The first aspect in the birth map of the Sun to the planets, will indicate the husband ; if in the oriental part of the horoscope, the marriage is m early life; if the application is by square or opposition, and to a malefic, it will bring unhappimess. The conjunction with malefics—Saturn, widowhood ; Uranus, divorce ; Mars, serious quarrels. The degrees between the Sun and planet would show the duration of the marriage. The Sun applying to retrograde planets—love

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XXII — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: and to a malefic, it will bring unhappimess. The conjunction with malefics—Saturn, widowhood ; Uranus, divorce ; Mars, serious quarrels. The degrees between the Sun and planet would show the duration of the marriage. The Sun applying to retrograde planets—love affairs that do not end in marriage. The opposition, square, and conjunction of Uranus, Neptune, Mars, and Saturn with the Sun, Venus, and Mars will bring great unhappiness to the affections. The Sun aspecting Venus and Mercury attracts younger men ; if to Jupiter in the 7th House, or well dignified by position and sign, it will bring her riches and titles. The trine or sextile to Saturn, older men, sometimes widowers. Good aspects of Uranus, fortunate attachments, as a rule, something unconventional or unexpected in the association or meeting. The Sun or Venus trine or sextile Neptune will bring a romantic idealistic love—with a younger man. There is always something unusual, unreal, illusive about the loves brought by the mystery planets Neptune and Uranus, and so often ending in a strange, unhappy way. The Sun or Moon m common signs—Gemini, Virgo, Sagittarius, Pisces—makes one in sympathy with the everyday man or woman, being not so prejudiced about ‘‘ class’ as the fixed or cardinal signs; for if one has most of the planets, including the Sun and Moon, in

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XXII — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: signs—Gemini, Virgo, Sagittarius, Pisces—makes one in sympathy with the everyday man or woman, being not so prejudiced about ‘‘ class’ as the fixed or cardinal signs; for if one has most of the planets, including the Sun and Moon, in these mutable or common signs, one would think as the poet Burns said : The rank is but the guinea stamp, A man’s a man for a’ that. The temptation of illicit love affairs to a woman comes through her Sun being in conjunction with a malefic—Uranus, Saturn, Mars, or Neptune. The Sun conjunction Saturn, trine or sextile Uranus, in a cardinal sign from the 10th House or the 5th, brings lovers who are rich, titled, famous, especially in the signs Leo, Libra, Scorpio, and Taurus. The cusp of Aquarius, Pisces holding the Sun or Venus, inclines to flirtation. The Sun in a bicorporal or

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XXII — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: double sign brings two love affairs at the same time, and women with the Sun, Uranus, or Mars in these signs, Gemini, Sagittarius, Pisces, understand that it is possible to love two men at the same time, but in quite a different way! Ptolemy says: “ Venus trine, sextile, or im conjunction Jupiter or Mercury, shows the woman to be virtuous and well conducted, but the opposition, square, and conjunction of Uranus and Mars with Venus, women born under such aspects are liable to become immoral and wanton, and commit adultery.” Illicit love in a man’s horoscope is shown by the aspects of the Moon and Venus. The Moon or Venus in Aries will make him flirtatious; Venus conjunction Mars in the 5th or 7th House in Libra or Scorpio, will make him amorous and licentious ; Venus and the Moon with no aspects from Mars, Saturn, Uranus, or Neptune, men will lead virtuous lives. Mars aspecting Venus in a man’s or woman’s horoscope always excites the passions and brings many physical attractions ; Neptune or Saturn, square, opposition, or conjunction Venus bring unnatural vices and depraved tastes. The Moon square Venus brmgs unhappiness in love—for in early life the man never gets the loved one he wants. The Moon trine or sextile Uranus, love affairs with married women in

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XXII — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: conjunction Venus bring unnatural vices and depraved tastes. The Moon square Venus brmgs unhappiness in love—for in early life the man never gets the loved one he wants. The Moon trine or sextile Uranus, love affairs with married women in his own circle of friends. The Moon in a mutable sign, trine or sextile Venus and Neptune, love affairs not in his own class, But Venus or the Moon in a cardinal sign elevated, some one of good birth or famous. x x x x x Happiness in marriage or love affairs depends on the temperaments of the contracting parties. Those born in the same triplicity of signs are in sympathy, and understand one another; for instance, a man with his Sun or Moon in Scorpio would get on well with a woman with her Sun or Moon in Cancer or Pisces; but in square signs to one another, they would not agree for long, but they can be attracted and do marry one another sometimes, for the two strong bonds that draw souls together are the one of love and the other of hate, and those who have not wisdom to see through illusion will be attracted until bitter experience reveals the truth. There may not be great faults on either side, it is purely a matter of temperament—for

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XXII — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: and the other of hate, and those who have not wisdom to see through illusion will be attracted until bitter experience reveals the truth. There may not be great faults on either side, it is purely a matter of temperament—for you can love a person and yet find it difficult to live with him or her. The two horoscopes should always be consulted and compared before entering imto the bonds of marriage. The happy unions are—the Sun and Moon in the two horoscopes trine, sextile, or in conjunction, and if Jupiter or Venus add their benignity, there would never be the “rift within the lute.” The ascendants trine or sextile or the same sign brings harmony between the two. The woman’s Mars or Uranus, in the same degree of the Zodiac as the man’s Venus, will bring passionate, adoring love—or when they come into conjunction

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XXII — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: by progression. The man’s Moon and Venus in conjunction, trine, or sextile the woman’s Sun and Mars, bring a union of happimess, peace, and contentment ; it would give her the power to hold his love against all rivals and competitors, for does not man meet temptation at every corner? Here are the psychological ties of happiness, for there is an invisible fire between the two auras, the soul’s love—passion ; an atmosphere of light, but “ the light that never was on land or sea,” for these are the loves that are eternity. “It is love which justifies marriage—not marriage which sanctifies love.” —ScuuURE.

title: Children
location: Section V — Sub-section XXIII — Children
text: Can a mother’s tender care cease towards the child she bear ? Yes ! she can forgetful be, yet will I remember thee. Paracelsus says: “ Formed in the mother, but not originating in her, they are from nature acting through the instrumentality of the parents.” The life is spirit and spirit is immortal and cannot in itself corrupt or change. These life forces are in the soul, the “ luminous sphere” that surrounds us and reveals itself through the mind. The soul does not come from the parents, but if it is to express itself with reason and intelligence, it should have a terrestrial body that is not darkened and over-clouded by disease—madness and vices—so as to hide its native lustre in the murky dust of earth. “The procreation of children is purely an animal function.” —PARACELSUS. As regards the probability of having children, the fruitful signs, Cancer, Scorpio, Pisces, will give a family, especially if the Moon and Venus are posited in the 10th, 11th, 4th, or 5th Houses in these signs. The Sun and malefics in barren or masculine signs in the before-named houses give only a few children. The Moon or Venus in the feminine signs afflicted by the malefics, the children will be delicate and a great trouble to the parents. The Moon, Jupiter, or

title: Children
location: Section V — Sub-section XXIII — Children
text: or masculine signs in the before-named houses give only a few children. The Moon or Venus in the feminine signs afflicted by the malefics, the children will be delicate and a great trouble to the parents. The Moon, Jupiter, or Venus in the 5th House—if there be no evil aspects of Saturn, Mars, Uranus, or Neptune, they will be healthy, normal, and intelligent, and if in the signs Libra, Sagittarius, Aquarius, beautiful! The Moon, Jupiter, or Venus in conjunction, in the 5th House, gives lovely and dutiful children, that are a blessmg and a joy to the parents. If these benefics are in the 10th or 11th Houses, the children will have splendid characters, attaining in after years positions and distinction in their careers. If the 10th, 11th, and 4th and 5th Houses only hold malefics that are badly aspected by the Sun or Moon, in either a man’s or woman’s horoscope, it is better not to have children, as they will be neither a blessing nor a help to their parents or the race. The woman’s 4th House shows her first child, and the 5th House is the first child in the horoscope of the man.

title: Friends
location: Section V — Sub-section XXIV — Friends
text: He was my friend, faithful and true to me.—SHAKESPEARE. The ruler of the Asc. trine or sextile to planets in the 11th House, brings friends of the nature of the sign and planets in the 11th. Persons born under the same sign trine or sextile, are attracted in friendship, or if the rulers of the two Ascs. are in friendly aspect. The progressed Sun in one map passing over the same degree of the Zodiac that holds the other person’s natal or progressed Sun, Moon, Jupiter, Venus, or Mercury, brings the most important, agreeable, happy, intellectual friendships. But if one’s progressed Sun is in conjunction or passing over Saturn, Uranus, Mars, or Neptune, it has a disturbing, upsettmg influence on the friendship, for Saturn gives distrust and antipathy; Mars, jealousy and quarrels ; Uranus, dislocations ; and Neptune, deceit. Also if these planets are posited in one’s own 11th House, ill aspected, it will bring that type of friend. Your rismg sign, the other person’s 11th House, will make you sympathetic to one another. Venus and Mercury in the 11th House brings many friends, artistic and intellectual, im good aspect to Jupiter andthe Moon. The feminine planets, especially Venus in conjunction the Moon, in a woman’s horoscope, brings friendships with her own sex—if Mercury throws an aspect, they are younger;

title: Friends
location: Section V — Sub-section XXIV — Friends
text: House brings many friends, artistic and intellectual, im good aspect to Jupiter andthe Moon. The feminine planets, especially Venus in conjunction the Moon, in a woman’s horoscope, brings friendships with her own sex—if Mercury throws an aspect, they are younger; if in orb of Saturn, they are older. But with the Moon square or opposition to the feminine planets, she is not popular with her own sex, and if from the 5th House, she is not devoted to the girls amongst her children. When her Sun is square or opposition with Mars, Saturn, or Uranus, she does not make friends easily with the opposite sex, and is happier without them. A man whose horoscope shows no aspects with Venus, or if Venus is square or in opposition to the Moon, cannot do very well with women in his life, and is never devoted to them. Masculine planets—Sun, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus. Femimine planets—Moon, Venus, Neptune, sometimes Mercury. “Tf your rising sign is the M.C. of your friend’s horoscope, or if the rulers of these signs be in friendly aspect, you will continue long inseparable.” —PToLEMyY.

title: Enemies
location: Section V — Sub-section XXV — Enemies
text: A heart that deviseth wicked imagination, feet that be swift in running to mischief; a false witness that speaketh lies, and he that soweth discord among brethren.—PROVERBS. The 12th House is secret enemies. Saturn, Mars, Uranus, and Neptune, square, opposition, or conjunction the Sun, Moon, Venus, or Mercury, will bring

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XXV — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: people who are malicious, jealous, envious, and scheming—who work in an underhand way against one. They intrigue and plot frauds, deceptions, with the danger of losing one’s liberty. The 7th House is open enemies, and often brings public criticism and condemnation, that is, when afflicted by malefics. Sometimes the husband or wife becomes one of the worst enemies. Mercury afflicted in any part of the horoscope brings mischievous “ tittle-tattle.” Saturn in one horoscope afflicting the Moon or Venus in the other person’s map, brings dislike and coldness. The same sign on the Ist and 12th Houses—you are your own worst enemy. With Jupiter on the 10th House, trine the ruler of the Asc. or Sun or Moon, one never need fear enemies; those who seek to harm one bring disaster on themselves, for this is the sign of a ruling monarch or king. Jupiter trine, sextile, or conjunction Venus, there would be very few enemies, as it gives a charm of personality that few can resist.

title: Journeys
location: Section V — Sub-section XXVI — Journeys
text: Long journeys by sea—the 10th and 9th Houses must be considered for journeys to far-off countries. The Moon, Mars, and Mercury, if in watery, mutable, or cardinal signs aspecting each other, bring many journeys and voyages. The 1st and 3rd Houses must be consulted for travelling in one’s own country or on the continent— that would be the near countries. Fixed signs on these houses bring very few journeys. If the Moon is posited in the 9th House, conjoined with Venus or Jupiter, it brings safe and pleasant journeys, with favourable weather. If with malefics—ill-health, danger, and unhappiness when travelling or through journeys. The Moon rising or in the 10th House trine or sextile Uranus, especially in mutable signs, brings many long journeys, and one will feel an inclination to change one’s country and try one’s fortunes elsewhere. Mercury and Mars in the 3rd House, in aspect to the Moon, will bring many short journeys, principally in one’s own country. Venus or Jupiter in the 3rd or 9th Houses, will bring journeys taken under happy, pleasant conditions—you will happen to choose the day that the weather is fine and the sea is calm. Ptolemy says: “Mars square or in opposition to the Sun or Moon will cause much travelling in foreign countries.”’

title: Death
location: Section V — Sub-section XXVII — Death
text: Also when they shall be afraid of that which is high, and fears shall be in the way; . .. because man goeth to his long home; ... Or ever the silver cord cr loosed, or the golden bowl be broken. . . Then shall the dust return to the earth as it was, and the spirit shall return unto God who gave it.—ECCLESIASTES. The kind of death will depend chiefly on the affliction of the Hyleg and Asc. ; should they be well aspected with the benefics in the 8th House, one will die a natural death. Saturn causes lingering death ; Mars, those which are sudden. The signs that hold these planets at birth show to some extent the nature of the fatal end, and the part of the body that can the easiest be assailed by disease. The Moon, when she afflicts the Sun by square or opposition, if he is Hyleg or the Asc., or the ruler of the Asc., will bring cold phlegmatic diseases, and if Mars or Saturn adds its evil influence, and in watery signs, danger of drowning; it also makes one a victim of epidemics of the nature of influenza. But if the Moon or Asc. is Hyleg, and the Sun is in a fiery sign, square or opposition, he will assist

title: Death
location: Section V — Sub-section XXVII — Death
text: watery signs, danger of drowning; it also makes one a victim of epidemics of the nature of influenza. But if the Moon or Asc. is Hyleg, and the Sun is in a fiery sign, square or opposition, he will assist by causing death by fire. Mercury afflicted and in evil aspect to the Hyleg, kills by madness—fits; and if Mars is also in evil aspect, by sport or accident ; Saturn, obstruction. Venus, in bad aspect of Neptune, ptomaine poisoning; in the mutable signs, diabetes—illnesses that destroy the beauty. Mars—from fevers in wars or strife. Jupiter—inflammation of the lungs; apoplexy. Uranus—surgical operations, accidents, or suicide. Saturn—paralysis, chronic diseases, consumption. Neptune—epidemics, suicide, drugs, influenza. The Moon besieged between Mars and Uranus, argues a short life. The benefics do not cause death of themselves. Venus and Jupiter, elevated, have great power to save life even when square or in opposition, but if the malefics’ influences are in the majority, and too powerful for them to avert the death, then their own diseases, as described above, seem to assist in the fatal illness. The four fixed signs of the Zodiac were called by the Ancient Egyptians: “ The foundation signs of the earth.” During the years of the Great War, these signs —Taurus, Leo, Scorpio, Aquarius—held the mystery planets Uranus and Neptune in

title: Death
location: Section V — Sub-section XXVII — Death
text: The four fixed signs of the Zodiac were called by the Ancient Egyptians: “ The foundation signs of the earth.” During the years of the Great War, these signs —Taurus, Leo, Scorpio, Aquarius—held the mystery planets Uranus and Neptune in opposition from Leo to Aquarius, and Saturn joined them with his evil influence in 1916; throughout the ages, Saturn has been proved an enemy to the race of man. Uranus and Neptune have shown their vibrations are also mimical. So many of the men born in these signs were killed, the few who escaped death were badly wounded. Ptolemy says: “If Mars is rising when a man goes to war, it is a sign that he will be killed.”

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XXVII — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: Kpidemics bring danger of death, if the malefic that is causing the spread of the disease also afflicts one’s own horoscope by transit, or being in conjunction with the natal or progressed Moon ; but if Jupiter or Venus is in good aspect and one has a strong natal horoscope, helping in the recovery to health. Another bad time in the life for health is when the eclipses afflict one’s Sun or Moon principally, or planets, by falling in the same degree of the Zodiac as in one’s own horoscope—the greatest danger comes not at the time of the eclipse, but when Mars, Saturn, Uranus, or Neptune transits by conjunction, square, or opposition, this degree of the Zodiac—within six months if it is a lunar eclipse, or within twelve months if it is a solar eclipse. Mars is the planet that is the greatest danger, because he moves quickly through the signs of the Zodiac ; then comes Saturn, but he is so slow moving, remaining two and a half years in a sign, so if the eclipse takes place in the sign he has just vacated there is no danger from him, and Uranus and Neptune would have to be near the point of the eclipse by conjunction, square, or opposition, as they move so very slowly. These transits

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XXVII — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: in the sign he has just vacated there is no danger from him, and Uranus and Neptune would have to be near the point of the eclipse by conjunction, square, or opposition, as they move so very slowly. These transits bring a dangerous and critical time of the life; not only do they relate to some one in particular, but to the world in general—all nations seem to suffer under such a transit of a sensitive point in the Solar System. The Great War started when Mars transmitted the degree of the Zodiac where there had been a recent eclipse of the Sun. This planet that signalises wars first retrograded over this critical point, bringing the “ Balkan outbreak,” then, when he became direct and passed again this degree of the Zodiac, the world suddenly flamed up into war, showing that mankind is not very highly evolved to answer to such an evil vibration. Man has made rapid strides in physical and natural sciences, but not in wisdom, for the modern conception of education is to separate the body—the earthly home of the soul—from its spirit and higher intelligence. The only difference between man and the animal kingdom is wisdom—for animals have their animal reason. One of the great minds of the far past said, ““ Dogs envy and bite

title: A General Judgment Of A Nativity
location: Section V — Sub-section XXVII — A General Judgment Of A Nativity
text: home of the soul—from its spirit and higher intelligence. The only difference between man and the animal kingdom is wisdom—for animals have their animal reason. One of the great minds of the far past said, ““ Dogs envy and bite each other, and in so far as men envy and fight each other, they are descendants of dogs; and if they identify themselves with the animal elements, then they are fully that with which they are identified.” So if man grows in scientific knowledge, without Divine Love and Wisdom, he will respond again to these planetary forces that are hostile to him, eventually destroying the whole race of mankind through his own scientific inventions that will be used for the annihilation of one another in the wars to come. “Wisdom is better than weapons of war, but one sinner destroyeth much good.’’—-HccLESIASTES.

title: The Progressed Horoscope
location: Section VI — The Progressed Horoscope
text: The Stars of midnight shall be dear To her; and she shall lean her ear In many a secret place ; Where rivulets dance their wayward round, And beauty, born of murmuring sound, Shall pass into her face.—WoRDSWORTH.

title: The Progressed Horoscope
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXVIII — The Progressed Horoscope
text: A Frew WorpbDs Upon THE SCIENCE BreFoRE taking up the study of the Progressed Horoscope, one must thoroughly understand the first part, otherwise the mind will only be confused and bewildered. Astrology is quite simple and easy—when one understands it—but, in the first place, it requires a good deal of thought, reflection, and meditation before it can be assimilated. A superficial knowledge is useless, it only leads one into error and misunderstanding of one’s own and others’ horoscopes. Ptolemy says: “A te aut Scientia: from thyself or learning; the understanding conceives only a general idea, and not its particular form. None but those endued with divine inspiration can predict particulars. The mingled influences of the stars can be understood by no one who has not previously acquired the knowledge of the combinations and varieties existing in nature.” The understanding of these combinations and varieties being important, when making a final judgment of a horoscope, do not judge from one sign alone, but make the decision from the aspects to the planets. For instance: Saturn in the Ist House in Libra with a close sextile or trine of the Sun or Moon, especially if they are elevated, would give quite a different meaning to this planet’s influence on the personality than when Saturn is in Cancer with a square or opposition

title: The Progressed Horoscope
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXVIII — The Progressed Horoscope
text: with a close sextile or trine of the Sun or Moon, especially if they are elevated, would give quite a different meaning to this planet’s influence on the personality than when Saturn is in Cancer with a square or opposition of the Sun or Moon. Saturn in this sign with imharmonious aspects, augments the evil brought by Saturn to the Ist House. The benign influence of a malefic is powerfully good. It is always important to notice these combinations, and not take only the “ planet”? in a certain “ house ”’ of the horoscope ; it is the aspects that make these combinations, showing the diversity of nature. Do not judge horoscopes analytically, but as running concurrently, one part with the other, and not consecutively—the progressed horoscope relating to that epoch in the life that is influenced by the progressed planets. So mystical and remote a science requires deep thought—a serene and calm mind to draw from this primal fount of truth; but it has the power to lift the thoughts into the abstract, bringing rest and peace from the worries and anxieties of the affairs of this mortal life, and makes one, as it were, above the illusions of other people’s ideas and opinions, coming to the understanding that man is only relative ; and Spirit—Reality.

title: Concerning Directions
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — Concerning Directions
text: Directions are of two kinds, Primary and Secondary, and are based upon mathematical calculations. The horoscope of birth with its twelve houses and signs, also the positions of the Sun, Moon, Asc., M.C., and planets, show what the general fortunes will be throughout the whole course of the life. Directions inform one in what year, month, week, or day, one can expect a particular aspect to materialise. A knowledge is required of the aspects to the significators—that is, the Sun, Moon, Asc., and midheaven of the birth map, their progressed position, with the natal and progressed planets ; also the houses and signs wherein they are posited, this bemg one of the principal effects in directions. These are the Primary—they extend over long periods. The position of the Sun, Moon, and planets at birth are the radix or centre, and always the most important points in the horoscope. Aspects are formed by the progressing of the signs of the Zodiac through the houses and the revolution of the planets in the signs, also the movement of the Sun and Moon in relation to the position they held in the birth map and by progression. In Astrology, every day in the ephemeris is reckoned for a year, two hours for a month, thirty minutes for a week, and four minutes for

title: Concerning Directions
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — Concerning Directions
text: in relation to the position they held in the birth map and by progression. In Astrology, every day in the ephemeris is reckoned for a year, two hours for a month, thirty minutes for a week, and four minutes for a day. So whatever aspects take place in the first day of one’s life will develop their effects in the first year, and those of the second day in the second year. One’s directions for the twentieth year will arise from the aspects which took place on the twentieth day in the ephemeris after one’s birth. The Sun moves one degree a year, forming aspects and conjunctions with the natal Moon and planets, including the Asc., M.C., “‘ Dragon’s Head,” “ Dragon’s Tail,” and “ Part of Fortune,” in the birth map, also aspects with the progressed planets, Asc., M.C., ©, D), B &, UY. Then the planets in their revolutions form aspects with the natal Sun, Moon, Asc., M.C., ®, 2, Y, and also between themselves, and to their natal positions. This is the general information and called Primary. Ptolemy says: “ When the Sun arrives at the place of any star he excites the influence of that star in the nativity.” The Secondary Directions are those in which the Moon should be chiefly considered. Taking those days in

title: Concerning Directions
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — Concerning Directions
text: Ptolemy says: “ When the Sun arrives at the place of any star he excites the influence of that star in the nativity.” The Secondary Directions are those in which the Moon should be chiefly considered. Taking those days in the birth ephemeris on which she is well aspected to the Sun and benefics, the years corresponding to those days will be fortunate and prosperous, especially if the primary directions are also good. But take the Moon’s evil aspects with the malefics, and the years corresponding to those days in the

title: The Progressed Horoscope
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — The Progressed Horoscope
text: ephemeris will be unfortunate and unhappy. A good direction gives prosperity in that matter signified by the house, sign and planet. The Sun’s directions are of a much longer duration. They signify one’s success or failure, good or bad health, preferment and favours to do with the career, and the people who have the power to advance the interests and position or the reverse. The Moon moves quickly through the signs, and although she materialises what the Sun and planets promise, her own aspects do not last more than two to three months, for she progresses from 12 to 15 degrees in a year—remaining about two and a half years in a sign—passing her own place at birth about the ages of 27 and 55. A very good plan is to draw up a horoscope for each year of life and compare the progressed positions of the Sun, Moon, Asc., M.C., and planets with the birth map. The M.C. of the horoscope at birth progresses one degree a year like the Sun. So if the progressed map is for the thirtieth year, add these 30 degrees to the M.C., and take the “Table of Houses”’ to find the Asc.—for like the Moon that varies in time from 1 to 2.20 in a year—and draw up the progressed horoscope as if

title: The Progressed Horoscope
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — The Progressed Horoscope
text: thirtieth year, add these 30 degrees to the M.C., and take the “Table of Houses”’ to find the Asc.—for like the Moon that varies in time from 1 to 2.20 in a year—and draw up the progressed horoscope as if one was born again on that day—taking the same hour as the birth map. The ancient Egyptians used to predict the events of a nativity, and what would most likely happen in that life, wholly from these Secondary directions, and in this old-world science it is just as well to pay great attention to their ancient methods. In these directions the Moon should be chiefly considered; her aspects, particularly to the natal map, are most important. When the Moon aspects by trine, conjunction, or sextile the “Part of Fortune ”—«B—it brings increase of riches, but the square and opposition would bring diminution. _ To Saturn a trine or sextile will brig one good fortune about buildings, possessions, land, and sometimes an inheritance, if in the nativity Saturn is well dignified by house, sign, and aspects of the Sun, Venus, or the natal Moon. But the progressed Moon, conjunction, square, or opposition Saturn will bring mistrust, fears, and jealousies. These aspects are evil if in the birth horoscope Saturn is on the Cardinal Cross—badly aspected, for the years corresponding to those

title: The Progressed Horoscope
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — The Progressed Horoscope
text: the natal Moon. But the progressed Moon, conjunction, square, or opposition Saturn will bring mistrust, fears, and jealousies. These aspects are evil if in the birth horoscope Saturn is on the Cardinal Cross—badly aspected, for the years corresponding to those days in which the Moon is shown in the ephemeris to be in evil aspect to this malefic will be dangerous and peculiarly unfortunate. When the Moon is directed to Jupiter by good aspects of the trine, sextile, or conjunction, she brings preferment and success to the career, especially if there are good aspects at birth with this benefic. Jupiter being powerful in Libra, Sagittarius, Aquarius, Pisces, and Cancer, and also on the Cardinal Cross if elevated, or trine, sextile, or conjunction, the Sun would make one at that time fortunate and eminent—for it can bring riches, glory, and renown.

title: The Progressed Horoscope
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — The Progressed Horoscope
text: The aspects of the Moon to Mars can bring victories and successes, if Mars is well dignified by sign, house, and good natal aspects. But when in the 10th House or 7th, and the progressed Moon is throwing an evil aspect by square or opposition, it brings into the life animosities, quarrels, and sometimes law-suits if in the nativity it has bad aspects; but good aspects in the natal map would help one considerably to get through the evil progressed positions. When Venus comes into direction by good aspects of the trine, conjunction, or sextile, she brings love and pleasure, and all matters in connection with women, sometimes marriage and children. Also in sextile or conjunction the Sun, it would bring a care-free, happy time, but inclines one to be fond of pleasure. To women it gives the love of a younger man—especially if in the 5th House. When the progressed Moon aspects Mercury, all intellectual pursuits are to the fore; also when Mercury progresses to aspects of the natal Moon it seems to have the power to stir up the mind to activity, giving the necessary strength to the brain to concentrate and remember—and have confidence in the mental faculties. In an old manuscript it says: ‘‘ Mercury’s directions are for knowledge of the amount of wit, understanding, trade,

title: The Progressed Horoscope
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — The Progressed Horoscope
text: the mind to activity, giving the necessary strength to the brain to concentrate and remember—and have confidence in the mental faculties. In an old manuscript it says: ‘‘ Mercury’s directions are for knowledge of the amount of wit, understanding, trade, industry, and journeys of the person.” When the Moon is in conjunction the Asc. trine or sextile, it brings journeys and changes; adding strength to the health, also influencing the affections and manners. The Moon in conjunction the mid-heaven will bring benefit to the career, and if it should have held this position at the birth, it will bring advancement and prosperity—this direction always affects the position and reputation. The Moon in conjunction with one of the four cardinal pomts in the horoscope, will make the events signified by that house prominent in the life. If the directions are to good aspects of the benevolent planets, the Sun, Jupiter, Venus, Mercury, or the natal Moon, it will bring prosperity of mind and body, cheerfulness, and all manner of earthly happiness. And if the Primary is also good, the horoscope then being in harmonious directions, one could expect to realise the desires and wishes in health, love, and worldly possessions. The direction of the Primary, and the progressed Moon in particular, in evil aspect of the malefics, Saturn, Mars, Uranus, and

title: The Progressed Horoscope
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — The Progressed Horoscope
text: being in harmonious directions, one could expect to realise the desires and wishes in health, love, and worldly possessions. The direction of the Primary, and the progressed Moon in particular, in evil aspect of the malefics, Saturn, Mars, Uranus, and Neptune, then no manner of good is to be expected, for everything of the nature of disappointments, upsets, and whatever makes unhappiness in the life, will be given by the influence of these malevolent planets when square, opposition, or in conjunction the Sun, Moon, Venus, or Mercury. If directed to the good aspects, such as trine or sextile of these evil planets, the misfortunes will

title: The Progressed Horoscope
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — The Progressed Horoscope
text: not be great. For sometimes these benefic aspects with malefics brmg good fortune and successes. The Moon directed to a trine or sextile of the Sun and Saturn, or Saturn progressing to a sextile or trine of the natal Sun, indicates benefits through the father’s affairs—inheritance, land, buildings, mines, also permanent positions and appointments. When Saturn is in opposition to the Sun from the ist to the 7th House, it brings great unhappiness to the marriage, and all kinds of persecutions from powerful men ; when square from the 10th House, signifying reversals, losses, and difficulties, one has then to contend with some of the most evil aspects in a horoscope, bringing poverty and danger of disgrace for a duration of three years. The Moon coming also into evil aspect either to the Sun or Saturn, these unhappy events are imminent. The trine or sextile of Mars, by progression to the Sun or Moon, will bring benefits of the nature of the houses that hold the aspects. It always gives enthusiasm, courage, and energy to any enterprise or interests taken up at that time, and in aspect to Mercury, gives a quick mind with constructive ability, also manual dexterity. Mars square the Sun at birth, and the Moon by progression in square, opposition, or conjunction, warns one to be careful

location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — The Progressed Horoscope
text: up at that time, and in aspect to Mercury, gives a quick mind with constructive ability, also manual dexterity. Mars square the Sun at birth, and the Moon by progression in square, opposition, or conjunction, warns one to be careful about accidents, especially with Mars on the Ist House, as it makes one too impulsive, reckless, and daring, bringing dangers of all kinds.

title: 1909 Astrology Of Ancient Egyptians
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — 1909 Astrology Of Ancient Egyptians
text: When by transit—that is once in twenty months— Mars passes over the Sun, Moon, or his own place, it makes those days dangerous, so care should be taken. The Sun by progression coming to a trine or sextile of Mars, gives nobility of character, despising all mean and petty actions—making one free, generous, and strong. Uranus ill-dignified at birth by a square or opposition of the Sun, Moon, Venus, or Mercury— when the progressed Moon passes over these aspects, she has the power to make them effective, bringing upheavals of a serious nature. Uranus well aspected by trine or sextile of the Sun, Moon, or Venus: it will brig unexpected gains of money and advancement to the career ; to Mercury it gives originality of ideas, and when the progressed Moon passes in conjunction, trine, or sextile, these events and characteristics will be prominent; and on the Cardinal Cross, great success, especially in public life. The Sun by progression trine or sextile Neptune lifts the emotions to higher planes, making the nature poetical and romantic; it gives psychic vision and understanding of the mystical and unseen forces that surround this terrestrial planet, the earth. It can also bring good fortune in a material sense, for it is the planet of luck—so these good aspects bring “ lucky chances,” and at

title: 1909 Astrology Of Ancient Egyptians
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — 1909 Astrology Of Ancient Egyptians
text: understanding of the mystical and unseen forces that surround this terrestrial planet, the earth. It can also bring good fortune in a material sense, for it is the planet of luck—so these good aspects bring “ lucky chances,” and at the time the progressed Moon is trime or sextile the Sun or Neptune they will be at their strongest.

title: The Progressed Horoscope
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — The Progressed Horoscope
text: Should the Sun be square, opposition, or conjunction Neptune, and the Moon by progression in bad aspect, it will bring a time of mental depression and continual anxiety—with great disappointments. These aspects bring illusion, drawing one into schemes and intrigues by those who have evil motives. It seems almost as if one’s intuitions were dead at this time, trusting those who only bring chaos and ruin. The houses that hold the Sun and Neptune at birth and by progression will indicate from which direction the trouble will come. The Moon by progression brings that type of person into one’s life of the nature of the planet that she is aspecting by trine, sextile, square, opposition, or conjunction. The square and opposition aspects indicate those who are destructive to one’s peace of mind and material fortune—for example, the Moon square Mars, or opposition Saturn—but the trine or sextile, and sometimes conjunction, those who are constructive—the Moon conjunction Jupiter, or sextile the Sun. These aspects are always relative to the houses the Moon is passing through and wherein the aspected planet is posited. title: Transits
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — Transits
text: Transits are the daily movements of the Sun, Moon, and planets through the signs of the Zodiac and their relative positions to the natal and _ progressed horoscope. They can be very helpful or destructive, it will depend on the transiting planet’s position in the horoscope at birth, or by progression, for the transits bring what is foreshadowed—they are, with the Moon, the “time markers,’ bringing the good and also the evil into the life. Their strongest action is when they retrograde, in close aspect, the conjunction being the most important. One will now require an ephemeris for the present year to enable one to follow their daily movements through the houses of the horoscope. At their passing in conjunction or aspecting the critical and important points of the horoscope, that is the Sun, Moon, Asc., M.C., planets, both natal and progressed, will have the following effect. Saturn by transit passes through all the signs of the horoscope once in thirty years. If at one’s birth this planet was square, opposition, or conjunction the Sun or Moon, and again comes by transit to an evil position, one experiences some of the most sorrowful, unhappy years of the life. In the first place, one must take every care of the health, trying to avoid colds and states of depression ; for

title: Transits
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — Transits
text: by transit to an evil position, one experiences some of the most sorrowful, unhappy years of the life. In the first place, one must take every care of the health, trying to avoid colds and states of depression ; for if he afflicts the Sun, Asc., or 6th House, his power will manifest itself by lowering the vitality and so bringing ill-health. If aspected to Venus and the Ascendant, one will feel emotionally depressed. Should one have been born when the Moon was im conjunction, square, or opposition Saturn, the year that Saturn by transit again comes to this position will be an evil time. The progressed Moon also coming into this aspect with Saturn, as they both move through the signs of the Zodiac at the same rate, one will be hampered and held back by this transit. One of the ancient writers on Astrology says: “A planet in tee with a malefic is as one fighting with his enemy.’ If Saturn be well dignified at birth, his passing by transit will not bring any marked unhappiness or great affliction. Uranus takes about eighty-four years to pass through all the houses of the horoscope, remaining by transit about seven years in a sign. If at birth he should have been slevated and in evil aspect, his passmg in conjunction,

title: Transits
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — Transits
text: affliction. Uranus takes about eighty-four years to pass through all the houses of the horoscope, remaining by transit about seven years in a sign. If at birth he should have been slevated and in evil aspect, his passmg in conjunction, square, or opposition by transit will bring some of the most difficult years of one’s life, marked by calamities and

title: Transits
