text: fatalities. If Uranus in the natal or progressed horoscope was in opposition or square to the Sun, Moon, or planets, when he comes again to this position by transit, it will brmg sorrows and _ difficulties. But his good transits of trine and sextile to the Moon will bring beneficial changes of residence and sometimes of country—it will depend on the house and sign holding the Moon and the transiting Uranus. Trine or Sextile the Sun: advancement in the career—with public appointments—always changes for the better, especially if they had this aspect at birth. Mars passes through the twelve houses of the horoscope once in twenty months; he must be carefully noted, for when he retrogrades or falls in conjunction with other evil transits on any sensitive point in the natal or progressed horoscope, the Sun, Moon, Asc., M.C., or the other two houses of the Cardinal Cross—7th and 4th—if badly aspected at birth, the Moon and Ascendant will bring sharp attacks of sickness and illness; the M.C., scandals; the 7th House, quarrels with the partner, either in marriage, or one’s affairs; and if in the 4th House, difficulties in the home and domestic life. But if Mars was in benefic aspect at birth, his passing by transit will not disturb one to any great extent. The good aspects he

title: Transits
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — Transits
text: one’s affairs; and if in the 4th House, difficulties in the home and domestic life. But if Mars was in benefic aspect at birth, his passing by transit will not disturb one to any great extent. The good aspects he held at birth, when he passes them again by transit, are very helpful, especially in illness—giving one vitality and strength. Neptune is slow movmg—she remains in a sign for about fourteen years—if she should by evil chance get into conjunction with the Sun, Moon, Asc., or M.C., m the natal or progressed horoscope, it brings one unfortunate years, especially if she is passing a degree of the Zodiac that was afflicted at birth, for her influence brings worries, apprehensions, and illusion—trusting people who are deceitful. These bad aspects of Neptune are unlucky for gambling or horse-racing, for one is sure to lose under this potent spell of evil. The trine or sextile of Neptune brings success in games of chance. Also giving interest in psychism and occultism. Jupiter by transit in conjunction, trine, or sextile, is a helpful and beneficent influence. He remains one year in each sign, passing through all the houses of the horoscope in twelve years; having the power to sweep out the evil forces or vibrations of the malefic planets that are hostile and dangerous. His

title: Transits
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — Transits
text: influence. He remains one year in each sign, passing through all the houses of the horoscope in twelve years; having the power to sweep out the evil forces or vibrations of the malefic planets that are hostile and dangerous. His passing over the Sun or Moon brings the most favourable influences of a life, for the opportunities of success come with these transits of “ the greater fortune,’ Jupiter. Transits of the planets in relation to the Sun and Moon in the natal and progressed horoscope bring the good and bad times in a life. While they remain in close aspect—retrograde or direct—they are as powerful in effect as the progressed horoscope, and can hold it up for a

title: Transits
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXIX — Transits
text: time, especially if the progressed aspects are not very strong or close.

title: Transits
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXX — Transits
text: THE SoLtaR RETURN The transit of the Sun is called the “ Solar Return.” The Sun transits the same degree of the Zodiac it held at birth every year. The Sun is the most important point of the horoscope, for it is the centre from which all must radiate for another year. A horoscope should be drawn for the exact second in time that the Sun again reaches the degree of the Zodiac held at birth. For instance, in the horoscope given as an example, the Sun was ty 5-23-6—calling it my 5-23, this is near enough. So drawing up a map for the time the Sun reaches this degree of the Zodiac, making the Sun the centre of this yearly horoscope, the Sun will transit m 1923 mM 5-23 on August 29th, at 6.30 p.m. So the horoscope is drawn up for this time, as explained under Section IV, “ The Horoscope or Map of the Heavens.” This map shows the transits to the natal Sun for the year. Bad conjunctions or evil aspects of the malefics, or the Moon in this map of the “Solar Return,”’ falling in conjunction with malefics in the natal horoscope or progressed, will foretell a difficult year—in relation to the house where the aspects fall, making the month important—that the Sun by transit

title: Transits
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXX — Transits
text: Moon in this map of the “Solar Return,”’ falling in conjunction with malefics in the natal horoscope or progressed, will foretell a difficult year—in relation to the house where the aspects fall, making the month important—that the Sun by transit passes through that degree of the Zodiac that holds this yearly Moon. But should the Sun not have any evil transits and the Moon in this map be configurated with Jupiter, Venus, or Mercury, one can then look forward to a happy successful year—particularly those months in which the Sun by transit passes the degree of the Zodiac held by these benefics and the Moon.

title: Transits
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXXI — Transits
text: THe TRANSIT oF THE Moon—or LUNAR RETURN The moon transits the degree of the Zodiac wherein she was posited at birth every month. So one must draw up a horoscope for the exact moment in time that she passes this important place of the natal Moon, so making this moon the centre of the map. This horoscope will show the planetary transits to one’s natal Moon, those gettmg nearer to this sensitive point at birth, month by month, and those that are passing away. Where the “ New Moon” falls in this map is interesting, if near a malefic it is unfortunate, so one must notice the house it affects; but coming in with a benefic in the natal or progressed horoscope, is a great help through the month ; also the transiting planets in conjunction with the “ New Moon,” their place, house, and sign.

title: Transits
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXXI — Transits
text: This monthly map of the transiting moon will reveal the events from day to day that can be expected through the month. Not only must you watch the Moon passing through the “ houses” and signs, which the moon changes every two and a half days, but also notice the quickly moving planets—Mercury, Venus, and Mars. Mercury and Venus, in their direct course, pass through a sign in less than a month; these planets are benefic in effect. Mars is a disturbing influence, especially when retrograde. The degree of the Zodiac held by the “ natal moon,” which can be and often is transited by these three planets, makes their influence prominent on those days that they are in conjunction with this moon. Where “ the Sun ”’ falls in this “ monthly map,” is an indication of importance relative to the “ house,” for he passes through a sign im a month, so transiting that degree of the Zodiac held by the planets in this map. If the Sun is a little in advance of Mars and Venus, it will indicate their transitng the Sun’s place during the month. When Mars is in conjunction, square, or opposition to this “ natal moon,” it signifies attacks of illness and sickness, either to oneself or relations; but the trine or sextile

title: Transits
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXXI — Transits
text: will indicate their transitng the Sun’s place during the month. When Mars is in conjunction, square, or opposition to this “ natal moon,” it signifies attacks of illness and sickness, either to oneself or relations; but the trine or sextile will give vitality and health.

title: Of Ancient Egyptians
location: Section VI — Sub-section XXXI — Of Ancient Egyptians
text: Mercury brings news ; Venus, pleasures ; Jupiter, successes; Uranus, upsets; Neptune, losses, misfortunes, and depression. Saturn is the most evil of all the vibrations, bringing deaths, loss of loved ones, loneliness, and despair. This ‘‘ monthly horoscope’ > shows the everyday affairs of the life, as enacted from month to month. Mercury retrograde, over the Sun, Moon, or planets, should be considered, for she represents “ conversations,” ‘ correspondence,” and news of all kinds; those days she passes in transit will bring the news and events in relation to the transited planet, sign, and house. Always take notice of the signs and houses wherein the aspects fall, as they show in which direction of the life they will have effect; for instance, Mars passing over the natal Asc., square or opposition the Moon—this vibration upsets the health. If Venus is passing over the Sun or Moon in this map, it will indicate events in relation to the loved ones ; in the 11th House, friends; the 5th, lovers or one’s children ; the 7th would relate to the husband or wife; if m the 10th House, it often brings gifts and successes in love. Sometimes these Lunar Returns have few aspects, indicating an uneventful time. An old manuscript says: ‘“‘ The Moon the same age as at one’s birth,

title: Astrological Precepts
location: Section VIII — Astrological Precepts
text: ASTROLOGICAL PRECEPTS. Some lives are so difficult and beset with temptation, trials, and disappointments, that it appears almost as if they were passing through an initiation. ‘‘ For only he who rules himself, can set others free.” —HERMES.

title: Retrograde Planets
location: Section VIII — Retrograde Planets
text: A BENEFIC planet retrograde—its power for good is lessened, but a malefic planet R,, its power for evil is strengthened. The help and success promised by a planet retrograde seem to evade one at the eleventh hour. Hell must be paved with the good intentions of retrograde planets, especially Jupiter and Mercury. When Mercury turns R,, the brain is not so alert— the talents not so brilliant—even in a horoscope showing great mental gifts, all intellectual work becomes an effort, the interest is not so keen. It accounts for non-success with those who were formerly considered clever; with Mars and Venus very much in evidence, the mind does not rule, until Mercury is direct again. The Sun and Moon are never retrograde, but Neptune about six months in the year is. Retrograde.-—The backward motion which the planets appear to have sometimes, in consequence of the position and motion of the earth. Symbol R,. Bad aspects of the planets seem to excite one to action, in the same way as the good aspects, but the results are different, for nothing turns out right under the evil directions of either the Sun, Moon, or planets ; just as the affairs of the life cannot go wrong under the good vibrations. The planets slow in motion at one’s birth, or by progression, bring

title: Retrograde Planets
location: Section VIII — Retrograde Planets
text: out right under the evil directions of either the Sun, Moon, or planets ; just as the affairs of the life cannot go wrong under the good vibrations. The planets slow in motion at one’s birth, or by progression, bring delays and long waits. Malefic planets in the 1st House, throwing a direct opposition to planets in the 7th to the Sun or Moon, bring quarrels, upsets, jealousies with the husband or wife; the square aspect to the 4th, difficulties in the home, tiresome moods, discontent; to the 10th, ruin of reputation. But this is of one’s own making, for remember the Ist House is oneself, Mars, Saturn, Uranus, or Neptune making the temperament difficult for other people to understand and live with, without it is tempered with strong benefic influences. Just as light does not travel instantaneously, it comes earlier than expected when the planet is nearest the earth, and later than expected when it is farthest away. ‘This also applies to the events promised by planetary aspects. Application : The approach of two planets to one another, and is of three kinds. 1. When a quickly moving planet applies to one of slower motion. We will suppose Mercury is 15 degrees in Libra and Mars 23 degrees in the same sign (both in direct motion), Mercury bemg swifter

We will suppose Mercury is 15 degrees in Libra and Mars 23 degrees in the same sign (both in direct motion), Mercury bemg swifter would overtake and form a conjunction with Mars, which is termed a direct application. 2. Is when one planet, direct in motion, meets another which is retrograde. We will take Mercury R, in 15 degrees of Libra, and Saturn direct in 13 degrees Libra. Mercury applies to a conjunction of Saturn by retrograde motion. The inferior planets Venus and Mercury, can apply both by direct and retrograde motion to the superior planets, Jupiter, Saturn, and Mars; but these superior planets can only apply by retrograde motion to the inferior planets. Direct Motion means that a planet is moving according to the succession of the signs of the Zodiac. M.C. or Medium Cceli, or Mid-heaven: the Meridian of the earth. The 4th House of the horoscope, the Nadir. Node—That part of the ecliptic where a planet passes out of the north to south latitude. Longitude and Latitude.—Longitude is where the degree of the planet is to be found in the Zodiac. Latitude

Longitude and Latitude.—Longitude is where the degree of the planet is to be found in the Zodiac. Latitude is its distance north or south of the Sun’s path, or ecliptic. Oriental—is the east of the horoscope. Occidental—the west. But the Sun or Moon are Oriental, when between the Ist and 10th and 7th and 4th houses. Natal Map.—tThe figure at birth—the Radix from which everything is judged. The Lord of a House—is that planet which is ruler of a sign on the cusp of a house. A Planet besieged—That is when it is ‘situated between two malefics. This is, of course, an evil position. Separation—is when two planets have been in aspect to each other, and are departing from that position. The Cardinal Cross is the Ist, 10th, 7th, and 4th Houses, whichever signs are on these houses is the

title: Astrological Precepts

text: Cardinal Cross—whether they are mutable, fixed, or the cardinal signs. Proportional Logarithms, for finding the planets’ places, were invented by Baron Napier. Modern Science tells us that 2,000 years in the life of a star, in proportion, is like an hour in the life of a man. The Holy Bible says: “A thousand years is a day to the Lord.” Relativity is a new light on the great thoughts of the Ancients; thousands of years ago they told us by words and symbols that there is neither Time nor Space, only events ;and our physical senses only know—illusions. All are but parts of one stupendous whole, Whose body nature is, and God the Soul. * * * * * All nature is but Art, unknown to thee; All chance, direction, which thou canst not see.—Popr.
